name: Ensafi Law | Bankruptcy Attorney
description_short: Los Angeles-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, foreclosure defense, and debt relief for individuals and small businesses across Southern California.
description_long: Ensafi Law is a bankruptcy law practice based in Los Angeles serving clients throughout Southern California, including the San Fernando Valley and Orange County regions. The firm focuses on personal bankruptcy representation, foreclosure defense, and debt resolution strategies for individuals facing financial hardship. Their service offerings span multiple bankruptcy chapters, property protection strategies, and alternatives to bankruptcy filing. The firm distinguishes itself through extensive coverage of Southern California locations (40+ service areas listed) and comprehensive educational content addressing bankruptcy myths, the bankruptcy process, and post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding. The website emphasizes preparation and qualification assessment before filing, suggesting a consultative approach. However, the website lacks specific attorney credentials, years in practice, client testimonials with detail, pricing information, or case results. The firm appears to operate as a legal service provider rather than a debt settlement or credit repair company, positioning bankruptcy filing as one option among several alternatives including loan modification and debt settlement.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Comprehensive coverage of 40+ Southern California locations including San Fernando Valley and Orange County
Addresses foreclosure defense and home retention strategies alongside bankruptcy options
Covers multiple bankruptcy chapters including Chapter 7, Chapter 13, and Chapter 20 filings
Educational content on bankruptcy alternatives, including loan modification and debt settlement options
Addresses specialized bankruptcy issues including student loans, tax debt, vehicle repossession, and mechanic's liens
Explains post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding and provides guidance on financial recovery
Services include small business bankruptcy, suggesting experience beyond personal filings
cons: Website contains no specific attorney credentials, bar certifications, years of experience, or qualifications listed
No pricing information, fee structure, or cost estimates provided on the website
No client testimonials with specific case outcomes or results provided
No information about initial consultation process, response time, or availability
Website design and organization appear outdated with extensive unformatted service menu without clear navigation
best_for: Southern California residents facing home foreclosure and seeking to retain property through bankruptcy
Individuals with multiple debt types (credit cards, tax debt, student loans, medical bills) considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13
Small business owners exploring personal or business bankruptcy options
Homeowners with second/third mortgages seeking lien removal or principal reduction strategies
diagnosis: Best for Southern California residents in active financial crisis (foreclosure, repossession, wage garnishment) who need legal representation for bankruptcy filing or foreclosure defense. Main caveat: the website provides no attorney credentials, pricing, or client results, requiring direct contact to verify qualifications and costs before engagement; consumers should confirm attorney licensing and obtain fee agreements in writing.
services: Foreclosure defense and home retention after bankruptcy
Vehicle repossession defense and cram-down strategies
Tax debt relief and IRS negotiation
Medical debt and credit card debt discharge
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 554 S San Vicente Blvd suite 160-f, Los Angeles, CA 90048
